title: paraspalathus hispida
intro: Paraspalathus hispida, also known as the hairy spider flower or spider flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Paraspalathus hispida is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
